notes: Single self-contained HTML, no libraries. Layered parallax (sky/sun, clouds, mountains, hills, tree band, roadside poles/bushes/signs, road + dashes, foreground tufts + dust) with continuous modulo scroll for a seamless loop. dt-based timing; DPR-aware full-page canvas; spinning wheels tied to speed; subtle body bob + pitch; cinematic sunset palette + vignette.
